reasons: The dev-jai-nexus and docs-nexus relationship is explicit, with docs-nexus retaining docs and source-intelligence ownership while dev-jai-nexus owns authority semantics and workflow policy.
Authority Levels 0 through 5 are documented with Levels 0 through 2 designable now and Levels 3 through 5 modeled but explicitly disabled in v0.
The motion is planning-only, documents allowed and blocked outputs plus the audit event model, and does not add docs-nexus write, branch, PR, merge, or automation authority.
